title: Lanugothamnus gnaphalioides
intro: There is not enough information available on the plant Lanugothamnus gnaphalioides.
taxonomy: Lanugothamnus gnaphalioides is classified within the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the tribe Gnaphalieae, which contains small shrubs and herbs. The plant's classification is further broken down into the order Asterales and the class Magnoliopsida. As a flowering plant, Lanugothamnus gnaphalioides is also classified as a dicotyledon. The species is native to Western Australia.
preparations: I couldn't find any specific information about herbal preparations related to Lanugothamnus gnaphalioides.
